backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the build targets JDK 17, failing to utilize JDK 21 features or enforce JDK 21 compatibility.

backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Set the maven-compiler-plugin release flag to 21 to ensure bytecode compatibility with JDK 21.
backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the compiler may default to an older release level or fail if the source/target settings are inconsistent with the new JDK version.

backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Pin the maven-compiler-plugin version to 3.11.0 to ensure support for JDK 21.
backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of the maven-compiler-plugin may not fully support or correctly compile code for JDK 21.

backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Pin the Lombok annotation processor version to 1.18.30 to ensure compatibility with JDK 21.
backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of Lombok may have runtime or compilation issues with JDK 21 due to internal API changes.

backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Pin the Lombok dependency exclusion version to 1.18.30 to maintain consistency with the annotation processor.
backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Inconsistent versions between the annotation processor and the runtime dependency can lead to runtime errors or missing annotations.
